ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., pants, shirts) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the size chart */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing (e.g., slim fit, regular fit) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart this measurement belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size designation (e.g., 26, 28) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for the size */,
  "front_rise" TEXT /* Front rise measurement for the size */,
  "leg_opening" TEXT /* Leg opening measurement for the size */,
  "thigh" TEXT /* Thigh measurement for the size */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit (foreign key to measurement_units) */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "back_length" TEXT /* Back length measurement for the size */,
  "cuff" TEXT /* Cuff measurement for the size */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck measurement for the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for brand inquiries */,
  "country_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand's official website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Pants, Shirts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user when performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart related to the recommendation */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size based on user input */,
  "user_measurement" TEXT /* User's input measurements for generating the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart related to the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., demand, stock) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score to quantify the trend */,
  "observed_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_trends_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a base unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the measurement before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the measurement after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES size_measurements ("measurement_id")
)
